rationale: Following Review 1 produces the better PR because its two findings are real (the hypothesis-suffix names `finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two_of_sq_mem_notMem` at diff:128 and `finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two` at diff:165 plus the pointless named `rfl` helper at diff:159) and match Mathlib-adjacent patterns cited in the review; acting on them yields idiomatic names without otherwise changing behavior. Review 2's 'approve' leaves exactly those defects.
